title: RSVP for Kenai and Anchorage 2009 shareholder info meetings
summary: The RSVP deadline for the Kenai and Anchorage 2009 shareholder information meetings is this Wednesday, April 22, and the RSVP deadline for the Shoreline meeting is the next Wednesday, April 29. These meetings are limited to CIRI shareholders and their immediate family. Shareholders must check in wit...
